title: Codex Job Result
description: Structured output from Codex execution jobs

summary.description: Concise outcome summary. Do not use this as the only substantive report when the task involved investigation, implementation, review, or debugging.

detailed_report.description: Manager-grade report explaining what was investigated or changed, the reasoning behind the outcome, important evidence, uncertainty, and any decisions the manager should understand. For non-trivial tasks this should be substantive, not a one-line restatement of the summary.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting the report: files, functions, commands, observations, test results, or other specific signals. Use concise strings, but include enough detail for a manager to trust the report without immediately rereading files.

files_changed.description: List of file paths that were created, modified, or deleted

commands_run.description: List of shell commands that were executed

tests_run.description: List of test commands or test files that were run

risks.description: Known risks, unresolved concerns, tradeoffs, or reasons the manager may need follow-up. Empty array is acceptable only when there are no meaningful risks.

open_questions.description: Questions that remain unresolved or need manager/user decision. Empty array is acceptable only when there are no open questions.
